column1: India DA/BA Job Market Intelligence | 200 Postings Analysed | Bangalore & Chennai | April 2026

column4: Data Source: Naukri.com | Collected: April 2026 | 200 Job Postings | Analyst: Arun Kumar V.R

column9: ? Bangalore has 70.5% of all DA/BA openings in India
? Business Analysis is #1 skill demand (32.5% of postings)
? SQL appears in only 19% — not as high as expected
? Python demand is just 8.5% for BA-heavy roles
? 55% of roles accept 0–1 year experience — fresher-friendly market
? Accenture alone posted 61 openings — 30.5% of all jobs
? 98.5% of companies DO NOT disclose salary on Naukri
